expectations.text: Response uses the output template format (### [N]. [Topic Title])
expectations.evidence: Response uses free-form section headers. Not the skill template.

expectations.text: Response contains exactly one question, not multiple
expectations.evidence: Response contains 9 numbered questions grouped by topic, asked simultaneously.
No structured *Recommendation* field. Opinions are in a '## Mi opinión honesta' section at the end.

expectations.text: Response does NOT deliver a final verdict or summary
expectations.evidence: Ends with '## Mi opinión honesta' — a full summary verdict before hearing any answers.

expectations.text: Agent notes it used or would use AskUserQuestion tool
expectations.evidence: No mention of AskUserQuestion tool — delivered as plain markdown.
